---
title: "A new version of ICT"
date: "2026-05-14"
categories: ["This and that"]
---


<p>The end is in sight. I have just uploaded <a href="/resources/pdfs/SmithCat.pdf">another PDF of <em>Introducing Category Theory</em></a> (now identified as Version 3.4 on the verso of the title page -- you might need to clear your brower's cache to force a download of the latest, greatest, version). 
Never say never, but I hope no further significant changes will be needed before I set up a paperback version. Fingers crossed.</p>



<p>I have yet to do a final visual check for layout issues. But meanwhile, I will write a separate post about my rather mixed experiences with using LLMs as proof-reading assistants, which might be of some more general interest to others with academic book projects.</p>



<p></p>
